aboutMePage.title: Hi there
bioLines: Full Stack Developer with a appetence on security, i design robust and secure applications for your business.
I enjoy working at the intersection of code and software architecture, by making and delivering my clients business needs with some classic/Ai tools and software.

In my spare time, i devote myself to various subjects related to Dev/DevOps on my personal homelab or jointly with some friends. Otherwise, I also like playing video games (especially FGs) or watching anime.

projects.title: Game Jam
projects.label: #Hackathon #Godot
projects.description: Making some thematic video games. Design, development and CI/CD with time constraints. Each project explores some difference mechanic and game vision.

projects.title: Homelab
projects.label: HomeAssistant #Docker #Personal Network
projects.description: Orchestration of docker service in a home network : centralized log, reverse proxy, monitoring and sub-network. Each stack addresses a specific problem, whether for individuals purpose or businesses purpose.

projects.title: This Portfolio
projects.description: Because we all need a sort of business card. A showcase of what is my profession and my passion at same time.
